title: The Nations Best
summary: A powerful mascot logo design for a professional esports team featuring aggressive typography and bold iconography.
description: A powerful mascot logo design for a professional esports team featuring aggressive typography and bold iconography.

sections.overview: The Titan Warriors project involved creating a powerful, aggressive mascot that would resonate with competitive gamers. The design process focused on conveying strength and dominance through bold geometric shapes and sharp angles.
sections.challenge: "TNB" is one of the biggest gaming clan in the NBA2K community, just like the name suggested, it houses one of the bests in their own field starting from players, content creators and graphic designers. TNB is also led by a well known content creator/streamer NadeGrinds and I'm really grateful to have the second opportunity of working with him after his first gaming clan project that we did a few years ago. I was approached by the team to do a rebrand from their previous Bengal Tiger mascot logo to whatever that I see was fitting the brand, we decided to do the King of the animal kingdom as their main mascot combined with royal aspects such as the crown and the castle as they represent as a "Nation"
sections.solution: Capturing the feeling of Majestic & Royality was very fun for me as they go hand in hand. Separating the hair shapes into thick lines, the slight open mouth and the fierce eyes was all in the direction of achieving that feel.
sections.system: Project scope included Branding, Main logo and it's alternatives, Apparel & merch design.
sections.applications: Project scope included Branding, Main logo and it's alternatives, Apparel & merch design.
sections.results: Capturing the feeling of Majestic & Royality was very fun for me as they go hand in hand. Separating the hair shapes into thick lines, the slight open mouth and the fierce eyes was all in the direction of achieving that feel.

title: DFDC Lettermark Logofolio
summary: A collection of freestyle lettermark designs created for the Dedicated Forever design contest.
description: A collection of freestyle lettermark designs created for the Dedicated Forever design contest.

sections.overview: A series of freestyle lettermark designs for the #DFDC2 contest.
sections.challenge: Here are my entries for #DFDC2 on Twitter, it was a design contest hosted by a gaming clan called Dedicated Forever, the theme that they held was a freestyle design so they gave you creativity freedom.
sections.solution: Winning first place by giving the most valuable entry, as the contest was organized by a group, I realized that the best way to win is by providing the most value to it's members and since most of the members are my past clients that commissioned me for their personal mascot logos, I decided to make an alternate simplified version to 12 members.
sections.system: A collection of freestyle lettermark designs created for the Dedicated Forever design contest.
sections.applications: A collection of freestyle lettermark designs created for the Dedicated Forever design contest.
sections.results: Winning first place by giving the most valuable entry, as the contest was organized by a group, I realized that the best way to win is by providing the most value to it's members and since most of the members are my past clients that commissioned me for their personal mascot logos, I decided to make an alternate simplified version to 12 members.

title: AZN Draco Font
summary: A bold racing/sports font designed with speed and unique edge geometry in mind.
description: A bold racing/sports font designed with speed and unique edge geometry in mind.
services: Sharp rounded corners (Not just straight rounded, but I adjusted the curve to match with the whole "fast" feel)

sections.challenge: Draco is a bold singlestyled racing/sports font that has multiple edges and corners that adds to it's uniqueness and modern feel. Draco comes with an all caps alphabets, numbers and punctuations, I may add more characters in the future. Even though Draco is made purely for speed, Draco can be used for a header, stream graphics designs as well. It would be really cool for me if I see someone using Draco as a part of vehicle wrap design or anything really.
sections.solution: Draco is a bold singlestyled racing/sports font that has multiple edges and corners that adds to it's uniqueness and modern feel. Draco comes with an all caps alphabets, numbers and punctuations, I may add more characters in the future. Even though Draco is made purely for speed, Draco can be used for a header, stream graphics designs as well. It would be really cool for me if I see someone using Draco as a part of vehicle wrap design or anything really.
sections.system: Project scope included 3 Corners, Singletyle (Italic), Sharp rounded corners (Not just straight rounded, but I adjusted the curve to match with the whole "fast" feel), Sharp serif tails.
sections.applications: Project scope included 3 Corners, Singletyle (Italic), Sharp rounded corners (Not just straight rounded, but I adjusted the curve to match with the whole "fast" feel), Sharp serif tails.
